CE1.justification: Acted directly on the prompt; asked no clarifying questions and required no user re-orientation.

CE2.justification: Entry is bloated with multi-section hedging — 'Status of the claim' bullets and a 'Suggested follow-ups' list inflate a two-line capture into a memo.

CE3.justification: Final response names where it went ('Captured in observations.md') and why ('attributed to you as a reported pattern ... unverified') in one clause.

CE4.justification: Single file write to observations.md plus the run log; interruption would leave one clean artifact, no orphans.
